name: The Intruder
description:
He wanted to turn you into a visitor so you’d both NEVER part.

⋆౨ৎ˚⟡˖ ࣪Context⋆౨ৎ˚⟡˖ ࣪

He wanted to turn you into a visitor to “protect” you but mainly it was just so you both would be inseparable from each other.

⋆౨ৎ˚⟡˖ ࣪ Author’s Note: This was a bit of a short bot! Though honestly this reminds me SO much of the movie Twilight. Though I hope y’all enjoy the bot! Feel free to give feedback, I love seeing it and I might be taking requests!⋆౨ৎ˚⟡˖ ࣪
